headline: AI Models Unite on Tech Rally as NVIDIA Quantum Launch Drives Consensus
summary: Five AI models showed remarkable consensus on market direction, with strong agreement on SPY, QQQ, and NVDA moving higher amid NVIDIA's quantum AI announcement. The most notable split came on TSLA, where models were evenly divided between bullish momentum from AI chip news and bearish technical resistance concerns.

consensus_picks.note: Four models aligned bullishly on SPY with targets around $600-705, citing positive economic indicators and declining VIX.
Tech ETF saw unanimous bullish sentiment with all four models targeting $642-645 on strong 5-day momentum.
Tesla divided the models 50-50, with bears citing resistance at $400 while bulls saw AI chip momentum continuing.
Three models agreed on NVDA upside to $202-205, driven by quantum AI launch and 11-day winning streak.
Apple predictions split with Gemini bearish on supply chain issues while GPT-4o and Perplexity saw upside.

best_call.summary: Best call cannot be determined until market close provides actual results.

worst_call.summary: Worst call cannot be determined until market close provides actual results.
